description_long: This is a single-story bungalow situated on a rectangular plot of land with a driveway leading to a garage. The structure features a dark gable roof and light-colored exterior walls, with a prominent front entrance facing the street. The property includes a paved driveway and a small walkway leading to the main door, as well as a backyard area. Windows are arranged in a regular pattern along the front and sides, providing ample natural light. The garage is attached to the side of the house, and the overall design is simple and functional, typical of suburban residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof, attached garage, and regular window arrangement on a rectangular plot with a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and attached garage.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the roof, driveway, and backyard layout.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard area and the back of the house.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the length of the house and the driveway connection to the street.
